scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps
scripts.test: pnpm exec bddgen && pnpm exec playwright test
scripts.setup:test: pnpm run setup && pnpm run test
scripts.clean-reports: rm -rf allure-results && rm -rf cucumber-report && rm -rf playwright-report && rm -rf test-results
scripts.clean-environment: pnpm run clean-reports && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf .features-gen
